human_actions_pending.action: Phase 3 UAT re-test (fly-out SOI behavior, intergalactic transit) requires a Godot F5 play session
human_actions_pending.context: Deferred since Phase 3; gated on the render debts (galaxy findability / Universe-space galaxy visibility) which are still open

human_actions_pending.action: Future render-debt phases will have blocking play-test checkpoints (run Godot F5)
human_actions_pending.context: Consistent with how Phase 6 was verified — visual/functional acceptance is human-driven

decisions.decision: Galaxies are SELECTABLE targets (Enter selects galaxy → fly to its center; d/Right still descends into stars)
decisions.rationale: User override 2026-06-21 ('override every decision made'); reversed the interim 'containers only' narrowing and reinstated the original D-51 galaxy-as-target case, so the marker also marks galaxies

decisions.decision: Target marker uses camera-relative fixed-distance placement with angular sizing (camPos + dir*MarkerCameraDistance, radius = dist*tan(targetRadius/distance)), depth_test_disabled
decisions.rationale: User direction 2026-06-21 — solves variable ring thickness, occlusion by other meshes, and far-plane culling all at once; direction still via UniMath LCA so cross-space/no-mesh-galaxy stays correct

decisions.decision: Ring line thickness held constant in pixels via rim_width = sqrt(1-(1-T/R)^2) from exact silhouette geometry
decisions.rationale: Constant depth alone did not fix thickness because the marker diameter scales with angular size; the analytic rim_width holds a ~2px band at any distance

decisions.decision: DEFERRED: time-slow / game-pause while the target menu is open
decisions.rationale: User parked it 2026-06-21; flight input already stops via FlightController.IsPanelOpen, covering the functional need. Candidate later polish (could fold into backlog 999.x)

next_action: Phase 6 is COMPLETE and verified (10/10). Nothing is in-flight. Decide the next milestone-v1.0 work: run /gsd-progress to see options, or /gsd-phase to define Phase 7 from render debt P1 (galaxy-space-star-meshes-invisible), or /gsd-verify-work 3 to re-test the paused Phase 3 UAT.
context_notes: Clean phase-complete pause on branch main, working tree clean. Phase 6 shipped the full targeting system over several human play-test cycles (galaxies made selectable mid-phase per user override; marker re-architected to camera-relative angular placement; ring thickness made constant). All 6 ROADMAP phases (1-6) are now complete = 6/8 phases, 19/19 plans, 75%. The render debts (P1/P2 in .planning/todos/pending) and the paused Phase 3 UAT are the carried-forward work; they are intentionally individual later phases per the 2026-06-19 roadmap evolution. No code is mid-edit. Durable engineering rules to carry into the render-debt phases: observer-unit conversion (metres / ship.LocalPos.Scale * factor, never metres*factor), read-only HUD/renderers (D-53), and cross-frame math via UniMath LCA only.
